---
name: 📚 Playbook proposal
about: Claim a sector/industry or a single stock and write its playbook
title: "[Playbook] <sector or ticker>"
labels: playbook, knowledge-commons
---

**Sector or ticker:**
<!-- e.g. Banks & insurance, or NVDA — see skills/analysis/sectors/README.md (wanted list) and skills/analysis/stocks/README.md -->

**Your angle:**
<!-- What's your experience with it? No credentials required — the playbook is judged on its content. -->

**Use case / reason for adding this playbook:**
<!-- Who benefits, what decision does it improve, and what is missing from the current toolkit? -->

**The 1–2 variables that set the price:**
<!-- The specific drivers, not P/E in the abstract. For a stock: what it re-rates on, name-specifically. -->

**One example catalyst + the primary source that reveals it first:**
<!-- A dated, recurring event type that moves those variables, and where the data appears before the headlines. -->

**Rough timeline for the PR:**
<!-- So nobody duplicates the work. -->

**Acceptance criteria:**
<!-- Observable conditions that will make the linked PR complete. -->
